description: Make the specified plot the current (i.e., active) plot. This will show the plot if it is hidden.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: itasca.command('plot <name> current') - no direct Python SDK method

keywords.name: s
keywords.description: Name of the plot to make current.

examples.description: Make plot 'myplot' the current active plot
